per_file_manifest_format: sha256 lines sorted by path, two-space separator, POSIX shasum format

subdirectories.pages/: rendered markdown documentation pages (primary content for read/grep tool sets)
subdirectories.raw/: raw HTML the crawler pulled down
subdirectories.sqlite/: SQLite/FTS index for deterministic lookup and semantic retrieval
subdirectories.manifest/: upstream crawler's own manifest files (assets, pages, chunks)
subdirectories.crawl-state.json: crawler state file at the time of snapshot

verify_command: cd swiftui-macos-corpus && find . -type f -not -name .DS_Store -print0 | xargs -0 shasum -a 256 | sort -k2 | diff - ../manifest.txt
